project_context.description: Command-center style clean dashboard for DSA agents/managers. Resolves clutter by introducing strict F-pattern bento grids, visual containment (scrollable panels), and compact tabular data layouts.

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full mx-auto p-4 md:p-6 lg:p-8 max-w-[1600px] bg-slate-50 min-h-screen space-y-6
layout_and_spacing.density: Compact. Use h-full to stretch items so row heights match perfectly.

top_stats_row.design: Cardless or 1px border cards. Label on top (text-xs uppercase), large metric value. Add subtle icon on top right.

performance_rates.design: Stack 3 circular ring charts vertically, or arrange compactly. Use small Recharts PieCharts or Shadcn radial charts.
performance_rates.fix: Maximizes space efficiency rather than stretching rings across 40% of the screen.

leaderboard.design: Compact table. Row heights small (py-2). Show Avatars. Target Progress bar as a subtle inline visual (h-2). Medal icons for top 3.

status_breakdown.design: Wrap the 20+ list items in a fixed height container with overflow-y-auto (e.g., max-h-[350px]). Use a compact horizontal bar style.
status_breakdown.fix: Prevents the page from being pushed infinitely below the fold.

bank_analysis.design: Table inside a max-h-[350px] overflow-y-auto container with a sticky top-0 header bg-white. Compact cell padding.
bank_analysis.fix: Contains the 25+ banks in a scrollable view.

set_targets_dialog.design: Clean Shadcn Dialog. Input fields and Save button using brand_primary color. Include data-testid='set-target-dialog'.

avatars.description: a person with a grey sweater
Man in white shirt smiling against a grey background
Young woman with short black hair wearing a black sweatshirt.
close-up portrait of a man with curly hair
Business portrait of a young man in a suit

icons_and_assets.usage: Use Phosphor icons (duotone or regular) for top stats cards and sidebar. Use medal icons (PhMedal) for the top 3 leaderboard spots.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the layout using 'The Control Room Grid'. Ensure no F-pattern violations.
Wrap Status Breakdown and Bank Analysis in `<div className='max-h-[360px] overflow-y-auto'>` with custom scrollbar.
Bank Analysis Table MUST have a sticky header (`sticky top-0 bg-white shadow-[0_1px_0_0_#e2e8f0]`).
Ensure Leaderboard table rows are compact (py-2, text-sm) to fit 9 agents without expanding excessively.
Replace generic avatars with the provided real images from 'media_urls'.
Use Shadcn UI components where possible, but heavily customize spacing to be tight/dense as per Swiss archetype.
The primary action color is #2c587a. Use it sparingly for primary buttons and active states.
